title: fam-exp — exp(x) END-TO-END as Form->asm bytes: the first COMPOSED transcendental FUNCTION on the native asm lane (range-reduce + 2^k + degree-6 exp(r) Horner + multiply), emits four-way AND runs bit-exact on the M4 within ~2e-7 relative of libm exp
author: Sema (Opus 4.8), autonomous native-ML walk
stone: form-native-models.form 'GAPS — LLM INFERENCE': the transcendental ops as form-asm bytes. exp(x) = 2^k * exp(r). Every exp-lane PART was proven four-way as a standalone program ending in ret — range reduction to r (form-asm-exp-reduce 31, #3935), 2^k assembly (form-asm-pow2 63, #3940), the degree-6 exp(r) Horner (form-asm-exp-poly 15, #3941) — but NONE composed into exp itself. This is the exact stone form-asm-exp-poly's OWN receipt named as next_stones[1]: 'fam-exp end-to-end on bytes: fam-exp-reduce (k and r) + fa-fcvtzs (k float -> int) + fam-pow2 (2^k) + fam-exp-poly (exp(r)) + fmul, returning 2^k * exp(r), four-way + bit-exact vs libm exp within tolerance.' fam-exp is that composition — the full native exp, the softmax/gelu/silu transcendental core, as sovereign asm bytes.
composition: fam-exp is genuinely NEW instruction shape, not a concatenation. The three parts each ended in ret and shared d0/d1/d2, so fam-exp re-lays the register allocation to carry k and 2^k ACROSS the poly (which clobbers d1,d2): (reduce) x8=log2e; d1=x*log2e; d1=k_float=frintn; x9=k_int=fcvtzs(d1); x8=-ln2; d0=r=fma(k_float,-ln2,x). (2^k) x9=k_int+1023; x9<<=52; d3=2^k via fmov-d-x reinterpret — 2^k PARKED in d3, survives the poly. (exp(r)) degree-6 Horner over the pool -> d0=exp(r), d1/d2 scratch, d3 untouched. (combine) d0 = d0*d3 = exp(r)*2^k = exp(x); ret; then the 7-f64 pool. ABI: d0 = x, returns d0 = exp(x). Reuses fa-fcvtzs (already present) for the k float->int cast; NO new encoder — a pure-COMPOSITION brick (like fam-max-loop).
recipe: form/form-stdlib/form-asm-matvec.fk :: (defn fam-exp () ...) with helpers fam-exp-coeffs (the exp Taylor list 1/720 1/120 1/24 1/6 1/2 1.0 1.0) and fam-exp-htail (the Horner tail WITHOUT a trailing ret — same fold as fhl-tail, acc d1=d1*r+c, final fmadd targets d0 — so the composition can append fmul;ret then the pool). fam-exp = 32 code words + a 7-quad pool = 184 bytes.
layout_math: The pool offsets are DERIVED from the coefficient count, not hardcoded. The poly sits after a 17-word prologue (mov-imm64 is always 4 words: movz+3movk, so log2e=4 + fmov/fmul/frintn/fcvtzs=4 + -ln2 mov-imm64=4 + fmov/fmadd=2 + add/lsl/fmov=3 = 17) and before a 2-word epilogue (fmul + ret) that sits between its final fmadd and the pool. Relative to standalone fam-horner-list (epilogue = just ret, 1 word) every PC-relative literal-load distance grows by exactly 1: LEAD = 2n+1, TAIL = 2n+2 (n=7 -> 15/16). The distance is independent of the 17-word prologue because ldr-d-lit is PC-relative (prologue shifts the ldr and the pool equally). Confirmed against the M4 otool oracle: leading ldr d1 = 5c0001e1 (imm19 15), every tail ldr d2 = 5c000202 (imm19 16). Pool bytes computed by f64-bytes, so any value fills the pool (1/720 = 0x3f56c16c16c16c17).

proof_four_way.oracle: M4-assembled bytes: an explicit movz/movk + the exact fam-exp instruction sequence hand-written as a .s, clang -c on THIS M4, __text parsed out of the Mach-O = 184 bytes (128 code + a 56-byte 7-quad pool). The recipe emits byte-identical.
claims: 1 — the composed exp program is 184 bytes = 32 code words + a 7-quad pool (len == 184)
2 — the FULL 184-byte program byte-equals the M4 assembler oracle (fa-conviction == 1)
4 — coefficients are DATA: f64-bytes fills the pool with the exp Taylor series (fhl-pool (fam-exp-coeffs) byte-equals the 56-byte pool oracle, fa-conviction == 1)
proof_four_way.command: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/format-arith.fk form-stdlib/f64-bytes.fk form-stdlib/form-asm.fk form-stdlib/form-asm-matvec.fk form-stdlib/tests/form-asm-fam-exp-band.fk
proof_four_way.result: -> 7 ; fourth arm 1 band four-way (fkwu, bootstrap binary darwin-arm64, no clang) ; 1 ok, 0 divergent — Go=Rust=TS=fkwu agree on the full 184-byte exp image and the f64-bytes pool. Crossed FIRST try on all four kernels (the htail recursion is a positional flatten the kernels compute identically; the offset arithmetic is compile-time-constant).

proof_on_hardware.path: Form kernel emits fam-exp's 184-byte image -> form-macho mo-object-sym -> Mach-O .o (417 bytes) exporting _recipe -> ld -dylib + ad-hoc sign -> dlopen+call double recipe(double). No rustc/clang in the COMPUTE (clang only builds the dumb dlopen harness and the reference; exp is the Form-emitted bytes).
proof_on_hardware.result: 14/14 on M4 (arm64 macOS). (A) BIT-EXACT vs a C mirror of the EXACT algorithm (roundeven range-reduce, (k+1023)<<52 reinterpret, identical degree-6 fma Horner, final multiply) at x in {0, ln2, 1, -2.5, pi}: got==expected to the last bit (x=ln2 -> exactly 2, x=pi -> 23.140694926573353). (B) within ~2e-7 RELATIVE of libm exp() across a WIDE range x in {0, +-1, 2.5, -3.7, +-10, +-30}: max rel = 6.652e-08 at x=-1, ~1.8e-9 at x=30 — the relative error stays bounded regardless of magnitude because r stays in [-ln2/2, ln2/2] for every x and 2^k is exact.
proof_on_hardware.note: The FULL native exp(x) now runs on the M4 as Form-emitted bytes. With every exp-lane part (frintn, exp-reduce, pow2, exp-poly) AND now their composition on silicon, exp is sovereign native compute: form-macho -> dlopen -> call over fkwu's own f64, no rented toolchain in the compute.

no_regression: fam-exp / fam-exp-coeffs / fam-exp-htail are purely additive to form-asm-matvec.fk (new recipes, no existing byte moved); the band and manifest row are additive. Sibling bands re-checked four-way after the additive edit — see re_check.
re_check: form-asm-exp-poly -> 15, form-asm-pow2 -> 63, form-asm-exp-reduce -> 31, form-asm-matvec-2d -> 127, all 0 divergent.
design_note: Design-with-reference held (the relu slip's lesson — four-way agreement proves DETERMINISM, not correctness; only the M4-assembled oracle proves correctness): the full fam-exp instruction sequence was hand-written as a .s with explicit movz/movk, clang -c on THIS M4, and read back out of the Mach-O __text section BEFORE authoring — pinning every byte and confirming the derived offsets (leading ldr imm19=15, tail imm19=16). The recipe's bytes were then verified byte-identical to the oracle through the four kernels (fa-conviction) before the verdict. The one design decision that mattered: parking 2^k in d3 (not recomputing) so it survives the poly's d1/d2 clobber, and computing 2^k BEFORE the poly (fam-pow2 clobbers d0, which the poly needs for r). READ-THE-BODY + uncontested-stone (lane-5): checked git branch -r + git log origin/main.. first — the recent form-asm-* claude branches (exp-poly #3941, pow2 #3940, softmax-max #3939) are squash-merged source branches with content already on main, not in-flight; codex/full-real-llama-generation-d617 holds the FULL-MODEL composition (its turf), but the atomic exp COMPOSITION was uncontested and was the exact stone form-asm-exp-poly's receipt named.
toolchain_free_claim: Honest floor: a Form recipe proven four-way (Go=Rust=TS=fkwu) through validate.sh (bash) PLUS an on-M4 execution witness (form-macho -> ld -dylib -> dlopen, no rustc/clang in the compute). bin-go is the bootstrap that runs the flattener/emitter. Platform rows (mac four-way + on-hardware observed; windows/android form-cli pending) per docs/coherence-substrate/standard-receipt.form.
next_stones: (1) fam-softmax over ll-buffer: fam-max-loop (m = max_j) -> for each logit exp(x_i - m) via fam-exp -> sum (fam-dot-loop) -> normalize (fa-fdiv) — the numerically-stable softmax the attention block needs, now that exp is on bytes. (2) fam-gelu / fam-silu: gelu(x) = 0.5*x*(1+erf(x/sqrt2)) or the tanh approx, silu(x) = x*sigmoid(x) = x/(1+exp(-x)) — both compose fam-exp with the arithmetic already on the lane (fam-horner-list is the polynomial engine, fam-exp the transcendental). (3) sin/cos via the SAME shape: range-reduce over TAU (mov-imm64 + frintn + fmadd) + a Horner over sin/cos coefficients (fam-horner-list) — RoPE's core. (4) a Remez minimax coefficient set for a tighter exp(r) at the same degree, when a lower error bar is wanted.
witness_state: pulse.coherencycoin.com at open: overall breathing, 0 recorded silences. Brick is host-independent (Form recipes + band + witness + receipt + manifest row); no deploy taken.
